children.name: Cyanea
children.description: Cyanea — a genus of lion's mane jellyfish in the family Cyaneidae.

children.description: Cyanea annaskala is a species of jellyfish that was discovered in 1882 by Robert Lendlmayer von Lendenfeld.

children.name: Cyanea ferruginea
children.description: Cyanea ferruginea, also known as the Pacific lion mane jellyfish, is a species of jellyfish commonly found south of the polar region and the Bering Sea.

children.name: Cyanea fulva
children.description: Cyanea fulva, the Atlantic lion's mane jellyfish, is a species of jellyfish found along the Mid-Atlantic coastal region of the United States.

children.name: Cyanea nozakii
children.description: Cyanea nozakii or Cyanea nozaki (misspelling), commonly known as the ghost jellyfish, is a species of jellyfish found in the northern Pacific Ocean near the coasts of China and Japan.
